message: The last big storm we had turned into a cozy weekend at home. With the power out, we dusted off the board games and settled in for some good old-fashioned family fun. It was a sweet reminder that sometimes, low-tech options can be the best! We laughed, reminisced, and even had a mini talent show with silly performances. As we huddled together, I realized that being prepared doesn’t just mean having supplies; it’s also about making memories when the world outside gets a bit wild. How do you keep it fun during storms or power outages? This little refresher helped us get ready for whatever comes next!
